## How was it tested?

- [ ] `./build.sh` passes (byte-compile + import every module)
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes (offline smoke tests)
- [ ] Manually exercised the affected command(s):

<!-- Describe what you ran, e.g. `python3 kalinga.py ship "..."` or a UI stage. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are scoped and focused (one logical change per PR)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or architecture changed (`README.md` /
      `ARCHITECTURE.md` / `docs/`)
- [ ] No channel-specific vocabulary hardcoded in the engine (extension seams
      stay registries)
